name: News Headlines
description: Fetches the latest news headlines from a public RSS feed
author: AgentOS

steps.description: Fetch headlines from BBC News RSS
steps.command: [xml]$rss = Invoke-WebRequest 'https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/rss.xml' | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Content; $rss.rss.channel.item | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "- $($_.title)" }
